fact: Signed profile-mean difference for near-equal-accuracy pretrained-random pairs: mean 0.149, block-bootstrap 95% CI [0.100, 0.199]
Prediction-accuracy difference for near-equal-accuracy pairs: mean 0.0024
Human-variation threshold (90th percentile of brain-source profile-mean differences): 0.035; 23/29 (79%) same-architecture pairs exceed it, 21/29 (72%) in favor of pretrained
Pretrained-minus-random profile-mean gain: 0.177, 95% CI [0.162, 0.192]; overall random-seed SD 0.027
Top-k coverage difference: 0.137 at k=1, 0.178-0.189 for k=2-10
Prediction accuracy alone can mask model-brain mismatches because similar accuracy can correspond to different recovered dimensions in the target brain's response space
source_location: Section 1, paragraph 'Prediction accuracy does not reveal which response dimensions are recovered'

fact: ImageNet pretraining broadens recovery across target-reference dimensions beyond the leading direction, not only improving prediction accuracy
ViT-B/16 seed sensitivity: pretrained 0.770, random seed mean 0.513, SD 0.005, gap 0.258, SD/gap 0.019

Random ViT has strong architectural inductive biases that produce a profile dominated by the leading dimension and dropping sharply at later prefixes; these biases interact strongly with synthetic images on NSD-synthetic

BrainRefScore is brain-source-referenced not a general performance correction: its reference is the empirical brain-source profile summary for the same target, not an estimate of total response reliability
BrainRefScore under adaptive rule: pretrained 0.833, random 0.594; fixed rank 2: 0.958 vs 0.801; fixed rank 3: 0.980 vs 0.819
L2-robust ResNet-50 has the highest brain-source-referenced profile score and the flattest recovery profile among tested objectives (ImageNet, DINO, CLIP, robust)
source_location: Appendix H, paragraph on objective sweep

fact: Prediction accuracy and recovery profile are complementary, not contradictory: accuracy reports prediction strength, profile reports which target-reference dimensions are recovered; DirCov can be high even when held-out scalar prediction is weak along that direction
source_location: Section 5, paragraph 'Response dimensions make prediction accuracy structurally interpretable'

fact: ResNet-18 features: 960 (stages 1-4); ResNet-50: 3840; VGG-16: 1472 (5 conv taps); ViT-B/16: 3072 (blocks 0,3,7,11)
